stories.name: reconcile-mode-prompts-and-schemas
stories.title: Reconcile Mode Prompts and Schemas
stories.description: Fix the three Mode 1/2/3 discrepancies in story-planner.md and stories.schema.json: update Rule 4 uniqueness wording to per-tag, update story ID patterns in stories.schema.json to ^S[0-9]+$, add a normative category-field note in Mode 3, add a Schema conformance item to Validation Checks, and ship verification.schema.json to lock the verification.json shape.

includes: Edit plugins/base/agents/story-planner.md: fix Rule 4 uniqueness wording from 'within the AC file' to 'within its tag'
Edit plugins/base/agents/story-planner.md: add normative note in Mode 3 Question record shape that 'category' (not 'type') is the correct field name
Edit plugins/base/agents/story-planner.md: add Schema conformance subsection to Validation Checks citing stories.schema.json and verification.schema.json by path
Edit plugins/base/schemas/stories.schema.json: update story.id pattern from ^[0-9]{2}$ to ^S[0-9]+$ and update its description
Edit plugins/base/schemas/stories.schema.json: update story_order array item pattern from ^[0-9]{2}$ to ^S[0-9]+$ and update its description
Create plugins/base/schemas/verification.schema.json: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 enforcing verification.json shape; ac_id MUST NOT be required
excludes: Renaming or renumbering existing on-disk stories.json or verification.json files
Changes to feature.md, verification-examiner.md, or integration-architect.md
Runtime schema validation inside base:feature or base:story-planner
Changes to any other agent prompts or workflow commands

stories.notes: lighter_path=false because verification.schema.json does not yet exist on disk (new_file predicate is true). All other lighter_path conditions hold: all file targets are markdown-class extensions (.md, .json), and all ACs are fully specified with MUST/MUST NOT normative language and grep-verifiable commands.
